candidates.why: Explicit total revenue/top-line row; preferred over component-equivalent duplicate Net sales.
Also a valid top-line revenue label and numerically identical to Total Revenue; useful as fallback if label changes by year.
Explicitly non-revenue, so not appropriate for REVT.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs among provided labels.

variables.notes: Selected the direct cost line. Change in inventory could also relate to cost of sales presentation, but the provided candidate is the clearest COGS row.

Alternate SG&A label but appears unpopulated/supplemental compared with the populated main SG&A row.
R&D row exists but is separate and appears below operating result; do not include in XSGA under the stated rule.
Balance-sheet liability component, not an income-statement SG&A expense.

candidates.row_label: Employee benefits and remeasurements of defined pension plans
candidates.why: Balance-sheet liability line, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists and is populated, so selected only that row per hierarchy. Excluded personnel and other operating costs to avoid overriding the explicit SG&A presentation.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D label exists; suitable for XRD even though it appears in the supplemental section below operating result.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D row exists, so mapped XRD to it. Not added to XSGA_COMPONENTS because the only R&D-related row appears below operating result, which the rules exclude from XSGA inclusion.

candidates.why: Semantically ideal label but appears unpopulated in preview.
Broad finance-cost line; acceptable fallback when explicit interest expense is unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

Interest-related label but unpopulated and likely only lease component.

candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure, not preferred over main reported interest/finance line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses on bank loans and overdrafts

variables.notes: Priority list uses the most specific populated interest-expense row first, then explicit generic Interest Expense label, then broader Financial expenses as fallback.

Only one equity reserve component, not total book equity.

Valid total equity line on the balance sheet; duplicate case-variant of the same concept.

variables.notes: No parent-only equity line is available, so using total equity as BE per rule. MIB is left empty to avoid double counting.

candidates.why: Income-statement allocation line, not preferred versus balance-sheet NCI for MIB.
Income-statement allocation line, not preferred versus balance-sheet NCI for MIB.
